tool_name: Shallow Foundation Bearing Capacity — Ultimate & Allowable Load per Terzaghi-Meyerhof

inputs.name: Soil Cohesion Intercept (c')
inputs.note: Undrained: c_u from vane shear or UU triaxial; drained: c' from CD/CU triaxial with pore pressure

inputs.name: Soil Friction Angle (φ')
inputs.note: Loose sand ≈ 28–32°; dense sand ≈ 35–42°; soft clay φ_u=0 (undrained)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 Table 3 — Angular tolerance class 'm': ±0°20' for >50mm side

inputs.name: Unit Weight of Soil (γ)
inputs.note: Saturated sand ≈ 19–21; clay ≈ 16–20; loose fill ≈ 14–17 kN/m³
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 376:2011 §5 — Class 1 force transducer: ±1% of applied force

inputs.name: Foundation Width (B)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7.3 — Default Type B: ±5% for unclassified parameters

inputs.name: Foundation Length (L)
inputs.note: For strip footings: L >> B; enter L = 10×B; for square: L = B

inputs.name: Depth to Groundwater Table (D_w)
inputs.note: GWT at or above D_f requires buoyant unit weight γ' = γ_sat − γ_w in bearing capacity

inputs.name: Target Factor of Safety (FOS)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 — Nominal/material selection, no measurement uncertainty

formulas: phi_rad = phi_deg * Math.PI / 180; Nq = Math.exp(Math.PI * Math.tan(phi_rad)) * Math.pow(Math.tan(Math.PI/4 + phi_rad/2), 2); Nc = (phi_deg > 0) ? (Nq - 1) / Math.tan(phi_rad) : 5.14; Ng = 2 * (Nq + 1) * Math.tan(phi_rad)   // [dimensionless] Meyerhof Bearing Capacity Factors (N_c, N_q, N_γ) Reference: Meyerhof (1963) — N_q = e^(π·tanφ)·tan²(45+φ/2); N_c = (N_q−1)/tanφ; N_γ = 2(N_q+1)·tanφ

B_L = foundation_width_m / foundation_length_m; sc = 1 + B_L * Nq / Nc; sq = 1 + B_L * Math.tan(phi_rad); sg = Math.max(0.6, 1 - 0.4 * B_L)   // [dimensionless] Shape Factors (s_c, s_q, s_γ) Reference: Meyerhof shape factors — Bowles Foundation Analysis 5th Ed. §4.4

gamma_eff = (groundwater_depth_m <= foundation_depth_m) ? gamma_soil_kn_m3 - 9.81 : gamma_soil_kn_m3; q_overburden_kpa = gamma_soil_kn_m3 * foundation_depth_m   // [kPa, kN/m³] Effective Overburden Pressure & GWT Correction Reference: EC7 EN 1997-1 §6.5.3 — buoyant weight when GWT within foundation influence zone

q_ult_kpa = cohesion_kpa * Nc * sc + q_overburden_kpa * Nq * sq + 0.5 * gamma_eff * foundation_width_m * Ng * sg   // [kPa] Ultimate Bearing Capacity (q_ult) — General Shear Reference: Meyerhof general bearing capacity equation — Terzaghi (1943) base + Meyerhof (1963) shape factors

q_net_ult_kpa = q_ult_kpa - q_overburden_kpa; q_allowable_kpa = q_net_ult_kpa / FOS_target + q_overburden_kpa   // [kPa] Net Ultimate & Allowable Bearing Capacity Reference: q_allow = q_net_ult / FOS + γ·D_f — Bowles §4.5; net allowable excludes overburden contribution
P_allow_kn = q_allowable_kpa * foundation_width_m * foundation_length_m   // [kN] Maximum Allowable Column Load on Foundation Reference: Structural load capacity: P = q_allow × A_foundation

V1.error_msg: Both c and φ are zero: soil has no shear strength — check soil parameters; at minimum one parameter must be non-zero

V2.error_msg: GWT above foundation level but gamma_eff appears too high — verify buoyant unit weight γ' = γ_sat − 9.81 is applied correctly

V3.error_msg: Very high allowable pressure for moderate friction angle: verify soil parameters with in-situ testing (SPT/CPT) before finalising

smart_warnings.message: Foundation depth < 0.5 m: shallow embedment vulnerable to frost heave, erosion, and surface disturbance — minimum 0.6 m below frost line per ASCE 7
Very high friction angle (>40°): verify with laboratory tests — field estimates of φ > 40° are often optimistic; use conservative lower bound
GWT within influence zone (D_w < D_f + B): full buoyant correction required for γ in N_γ term — EC7 §6.5.3(4) applies
FOS < 2.5 for cohesionless soil: increased uncertainty in φ and soil variability — EC7 recommends partial factor approach (γ_φ = 1.25) as verification
Square/circular footing: shape factors significantly increase capacity vs strip — verify punching shear capacity of footing in structural design

fmea.effect: Both c and φ are zero: soil has no shear strength — check soil parameters; at minimum one parameter must be non-zero
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: GWT above foundation level but gamma_eff appears too high — verify buoyant unit weight γ' = γ_sat − 9.81 is applied correctly
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Very high allowable pressure for moderate friction angle: verify soil parameters with in-situ testing (SPT/CPT) before finalising
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Foundation depth < 0.5 m: shallow embedment vulnerable to frost heave, erosion, and surface disturbance — minimum 0.6 m below frost line per ASCE 7
Very high friction angle (>40°): verify with laboratory tests — field estimates of φ > 40° are often optimistic; use conservative lower bound
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: phi_deg > 40 && cohesion_kpa === 0

fmea.failureMode: GWT within influence zone (D_w < D_f + B): full buoyant correction required for γ in N_γ term — EC7 §6.5.3(4) applies
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: groundwater_depth_m < foundation_depth_m + foundation_width_m

fmea.failureMode: FOS < 2.5 for cohesionless soil: increased uncertainty in φ and soil variability — EC7 recommends partial factor approach (γ_φ = 1.25) as verification
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: FOS_target < 2.5 && cohesion_kpa === 0

fmea.failureMode: Square/circular footing: shape factors significantly increase capacity vs strip — verify punching shear capacity of footing in structural design
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: foundation_width_m / foundation_length_m > 0.9
